file_insights.changes: Replaced 2 stub endpoints with fully functional implementations
key_additions: GET /summary: Aggregates pipeline counts by status, type, and recent items
GET /upcoming: Queries next 7 days of pending scheduled content with associated content details

patterns_discovered.description: Iterating through ContentStatus/ContentType enums and executing count queries for each value
patterns_discovered.benefit: Systematic aggregation of all possible status/type combinations

patterns_discovered.description: Using datetime.utcnow() with timedelta for bounded temporal queries
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clean, readable time range queries without magic numbers

patterns_discovered.description: Converting model instances to dictionaries with explicit field mapping
patterns_discovered.benefit: Fine-grained control over response payload and formatting

patterns_discovered.description: Sequential fetching of ContentItem records after retrieving ScheduleEntry list
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible loading strategy with explicit control over which fields to include

gotchas_discovered.description: Fetches ScheduleEntry list, then loops to fetch each ContentItem individually instead of using JOIN
gotchas_discovered.impact: Performance degrades linearly with number of scheduled entries

gotchas_discovered.issue: Missing error handling for content item retrieval
gotchas_discovered.description: Does not handle case where content.id references non-existent ContentItem
gotchas_discovered.impact: Returns 'Unknown' title but response may have null content_type

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses datetime.utcnow() without considering timezone-aware operations or user local time
gotchas_discovered.impact: May cause scheduling inconsistencies if system needs to support multiple timezones

gotchas_discovered.description: Converts all 10 recent items to dictionaries without streaming or lazy evaluation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Minor memory overhead; becomes issue only if limit increases significantly

approach_outcome.summary: Both dashboard endpoints successfully implemented with proper database queries and data aggregation
strengths: Correct use of SessionDep for async database access
Proper enum handling for ContentStatus and ContentType filtering
Logical separation of concerns (status aggregation vs. upcoming scheduling)
Status filtering in upcoming endpoint (PENDING only) is correct business logic
approach_outcome.test_coverage_indicators: No explicit test files in diff; recommend adding tests for edge cases (empty results, timezone boundaries)

recommendations.recommendation: Replace loop-based content fetching with SQLAlchemy JOIN to eliminate N+1 queries
Create Pydantic response models instead of manual dict serialization
recommendations.rationale: Provides API documentation, validation, and IDE support

recommendations.recommendation: Add explicit handling for missing content items in upcoming endpoint
recommendations.suggested_approach: Skip entries with missing content or return error status field

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination to recent_items when dataset grows beyond 100 items
Consider switching to timezone-aware datetime operations
recommendations.suggested_approach: Use datetime.now(timezone.utc) or app-wide timezone configuration
